constraints.name: warnLargeGuestCount
constraints.messageTemplate: Large event with {guestCount} guests - verify capacity and staffing

constraints.name: warnHighCostVariance
constraints.messageTemplate: Total cost variance exceeds 10% of budget

constraints.name: blockNoGuestCount
constraints.messageTemplate: Cannot confirm event '{eventName}' with no guest count

constraints.name: warnLargeGuestCountChange
constraints.messageTemplate: Guest count changing significantly from {oldCount} to {newCount}

policies.name: EventManagement
policies.message: Event coordinators and above can manage events for their tenant

policies.name: EventCreate
policies.message: Event coordinators and above can create events for their tenant

policies.name: EventUpdate
policies.message: Event coordinators and above can update events for their tenant

policies.name: ProfitabilityManagement
policies.message: Managers and finance can manage profitability

policies.name: SummaryManagement
policies.message: Event coordinators and above can manage summaries
